CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value String);
SELECT id, hex(murmurHash3_128(value)) AS hash_value FROM test_table WHERE id > 1;
SELECT id, hex(murmurHash3_128(value)) FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '%mur%';
CREATE TABLE another_table (id Int32, ref_id Int32);
SELECT atest.id, hex(murmurHash3_128(test_table.value)) AS hash_value FROM test_table AS atest JOIN another_table ON atest.id = another_table.ref_id;
SELECT hex(murmurHash3_128(CONCAT(value, '-suffix'))) FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT ref_id FROM another_table WHERE id = 1);
CREATE TABLE complex_table (a String, b String);
SELECT hex(murmurHash3_128(a, b)) AS complex_hash FROM complex_table GROUP BY a, b;
SELECT hex(murmurHash3_128(value)) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id < 3) AS subquery;
SELECT hex(murmurHash3_128(value)) FROM test_table ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 2;
